title: Permanent FINAL_ZOMBIE lifecycle + rare recovery probes
summary: Extend FINAL_ZOMBIE lifecycle handling: FINAL_ZOMBIE stops normal retry/micro-probe loops and is re-checked only rarely via a low-frequency quote_sell recovery probe. When a sell route returns, emit final_zombie_recovered_route and transition back to ZOMBIE with zombie_reason=final_zombie_recovered_route so the existing controlled exit path can resume. Add FINAL_ZOMBIE observability events and CLI status fields for final_zombie_positions and recoverable_zombie_candidates. No position deletion; no external systems; accounting guards (T-013/T-014) remain intact.
why_safe: FINAL_ZOMBIE remains terminal for normal loops; recovery probes are low-frequency and do not execute trades.
If liquidity returns, we reuse the existing ZOMBIE/EXIT_BLOCKED exit path instead of adding new execution logic.
Entry capacity and accounting truth remain conservative; FINAL_ZOMBIE is still excluded from effective capacity.
commit_message: Add rare FINAL_ZOMBIE recovery probes and lifecycle observability
notes_for_cursor: Scope limited to trader/config/cli + focused FINAL_ZOMBIE tests and this handoff JSON. Do not add external calls. Do not delete positions. Do not alter accounting guards.
